name: Penta
description: Upright pentagons tiling in rows, each one re-inking on every redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 4%, 96% 40%, 78% 96%, 22% 96%, 4% 40%); clip-path: polygon(50% 4%, 96% 40%, 78% 96%, 22% 96%, 4% 40%); opacity: @rand(0.8, 1); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
